examples: A tuneable antenna is an antenna that can change resonance frequencies for effective reception of a wide range frequency bands.
For tuneable loops the inductance can be so high as to limit the useful frequency range and here mobius winding techniques can help out.
Your eyes are lode-stars and your tongue's sweet air More tuneable than lark to shepherd's ear, When wheat is green, when hawthorn buds appear.
